title: Run session stack red-pen review
goal: Let Samwise review a PersonaKit session stack through PersonaKit MCP first, score its safety and likely deliverable quality, red-pen the highest-leverage weaknesses, and persist a durable review artifact before recommending follow-up action.

steps.text: Resolve `targetSessionRef` through PersonaKit MCP first using `personakit_resolve_session_ref`. Accept either a canonical session id or a session-file path, then normalize the review target to one canonical session id before continuing.
Use PersonaKit MCP to trace and inspect the normalized session stack: call `personakit_trace_session`, then explain the directive and any materially relevant entities before reading secondary docs.

If PersonaKit MCP is unavailable, missing required session-resolution capability, or cannot trace the normalized target, stop the review, write an MCP-gap artifact instead of a fake confidence review, and recommend the smallest MCP improvement needed next.
Restate the target session's promised goal, expected deliverables, normalized session id, and real execution surface before making judgments.

Produce ordered findings first, with severity and file references, focusing on contradictions, weak enforcement, drift risk, hallucination risk, persona/identity collision risk, operator-surprise risk, and any gap between the stated contract and what the machine-readable stack actually guarantees.

For each reviewed artifact, write a SWOT plus fixed risk-dimension scores for contract clarity, enforcement strength, drift resistance, hallucination risk, persona/identity collision risk, operator surprise risk, reviewability, and MCP dependency health. Then compute one overall confidence score and safe/caution/unsafe verdict.
Run a red-pen pass that proposes the smallest changes most likely to improve reliability, then rescore each artifact under those explicit red-pen assumptions.

Write or update the human-readable review artifact at `reviewArtifactPath` or the default session-review path from `session-stack-review-log-contract`, then append one machine-readable log entry with current/projected confidence, verdict, blocker count, and MCP status.
Summarize the review in one table plus one short paragraph that distinguishes current confidence from projected post-red-pen confidence.
Pause for AJ review before implementing any fixes, broadening the review scope, or converting review findings into structural pack/session updates.

acceptanceCriteria: The review starts from `targetSessionRef`, normalizes the session through PersonaKit MCP, and traces every materially relevant defining artifact
The review fails closed with an MCP-gap artifact when PersonaKit MCP cannot resolve or trace the target session
Findings appear before overview text and include file references
Each reviewed artifact has a SWOT, fixed risk-dimension scores, and a current confidence score
The red-pen pass proposes bounded changes instead of vague aspirations
Each artifact is rescored after the red-pen assumptions
The review artifact and JSONL log are both written at durable session-review paths
The final summary includes both a table and a short narrative conclusion

verification.text: Confirm the review resolved the target through PersonaKit MCP before reading secondary docs and traced directive, intents, essentials, and continuity records as needed
Confirm findings come first and fixed risk-dimension scoring is present before and after the red-pen pass
Confirm the review artifact includes one summary table, one short concluding paragraph, and one explicit verdict
